title: Slow Days at Home: Cooking, Packing for a Special Trip, New Makeup Try-On and Event Night
description:
Welcome Loves, 

Spend a few slow, cozy days at home with me in this lifestyle vlog. I’m sharing my latest vintage home decor find, a simple cooking recipe, and a full try-on of new makeup by Nars, Merit and Dior Beauty. 
Come along as I get ready for and attend a special event celebrating the launch of a new fragrance, plus a behind-the-scenes look at a busy packing day as new pieces arrive for our clothing brand.
I wrap up the vlog by packing for a very exciting upcoming trip ✨
#vlog #lifestyl
